message:
fix(approval,ru-sync): TOCTOU race condition and DB update on failure

- bd-2zlb9: Add atomic status check in decideApproval WHERE clause
  to prevent concurrent decision race condition
- bd-3eq7c: Update database with failure status when sync operation
  throws an exception

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
